title: Dryopteris rubiginosa
taxonomy: Dryopteris rubiginosa belongs to the kingdom Plantae, specifically the division Pteridophyta, which includes ferns. The genus Dryopteris is a group of ferns commonly known as scaly male ferns. Within this genus, Dryopteris rubiginosa is a species that is native to certain parts of the world. It is often classified in the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a group of ferns that are closely related to the wood ferns. The exact classification of Dryopteris rubiginosa may vary slightly depending on the source.
